'''Sam Royle''' (born 12 February 2000) is a former [[rugby league]] footballer who last played as a {{rlp|sr}} forward for [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]].<ref>{{Cite web|last=Cultivate|title=Sam Royle|url=https://www.saintsrlfc.com/teams/reserves/sam-royle/|access-date=2020-12-04|website=St.Helens R.F.C.|language=en-GB}}</ref>

==Playing career==
===St Helens===
He signed with the St Helens academy from [[Thatto Heath Crusaders]] RFC at the age of 11. He won the St Helens Under-19's Academy Player of the Year in 2019.{{citation needed|date=August 2023}}

=== Swinton Lions (DR loan) ===
On 20 December 2023 it was reported that he joined [[Swinton Lions]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on [[RFL dual registration|DR]] loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Swinton Lions|date=20 Dec 2023|accessdate=11 Sep 2024|title=Swinton Lions and St Helens Dual Registration Agreement to continue in 2024|url=https://swintonlionsrlfc.co.uk/news/lions-and-saints-confirm-dr/}}</ref>
He left St Helens at the end of the 2024 season to pursue an opportunity outside of rugby league.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/st-helens-confirm-seven-player-exits-with-one-major-name-omitted-from-list-97627/|title=St Helens confirm seven player exits with one major name omitted from list|website=www.seriousaboutrl.com}}</ref>
